headline: Evercore ISI Lowers First Solar (FSLR) Price Target to $212
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is among the 11 Most Undervalued Renewable Energy Stocks to Invest In. On March 5, Evercore ISI analyst Nicholas Amicucci lowered the firm’s price target on First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) to $212 from $241 while maintaining an In Line rating on the shares. headline: Cuba partially restores power as President Díaz-Canel vows ‘unyielding resistance’ to U.S. oil blockade
summary: The communist-run island nation is thought to be facing its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union amid a U.S. oil blockade.
